en.name: Level 34 — Sewer System
en.shortDescription: A tight, pitch-black sewer of brick and stone where the water below may drop you into other levels. Home to several dangerous entities.
en.atmosphere: Claustrophobic darkness over stagnant water, hostile creatures lurking in the cramped tunnels.
en.tips: Bring a light and almond water. Kill your flashlight if you meet Smilers. Never fall into the water.
